title: KOWI's Laser Mod
description: This is a survival friendly mod that adds working and fully upgradable lasers into minecraft!!
body:
![Mod Banner](https://github.com/KOWI2OO3/Laser-Mod/blob/master/pages/banner.png?raw=true)

This is a Minecraft survival friendly mod that adds working lasers into minecraft!!



 
<details>
<summary>Links</summary>

- Modrinth: [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/kowis-laser-mod)
- CurseForge: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/laser-mod)

</details>

 ![Overview Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/b703272c005d76e39ddc1facc94649d234dc557c.png)
 
**REAL WORKING LASERS!!!**

This mod Has Cool aditions To Minecraft like These:
 ![Colored Lasers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/1915b6d584309f7d377f11b0c842db187d2de611.png)
 ![Colored Laser in power mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/db7f67823398912a4b35fb6750f7239f1f568d52.png)

**Customizable Laser!**

lasers are fully customizable using the upgrades in this mod, but it isn't only cosmetic. you can make the lasers:

· deal more damage

· let them set entities on fire

· Mine Blocks

· pull or push entities

you can even let them be invisible and silence, the only way you wil be able to see the laser is to wear the IR Glasses added in this mod.

 
 ![Laser Redstone Interactions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/6659bd565605db2c4684880e0603b35362b623ab.png)

**Laser Redstone Interactions**

These Lasers can be used in redstone contraptions using the laser and the laser catcher you have a redstone signal througj the air!


  ![Laser Path Tracing display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/c38ee817e20d566f4ee8a2b1a91bb71d73cb772e.png)
  ![Laser Path Tracing display doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/8e2d7fac6fc0b742d7d0d6e8f6d3206fc2f87fc0.png)

**Advanced Laser Technology**

The lasers in this mod have advanced laser technology, this is what I call RayTracing (no Special hardware required). This is a path tracing technology that is compatible with most models (including models from other mods)

 

 ![Laser Tool display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/d8baed4d48731c555f97caa5297510131ed737c8.png)

**Laser Tools**


 ![Colored Laser Tool display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/b84d389809bb89da0878dc66e1f7242c183f0cae.png)
 
**These Tool are fully customizable!**

 these tools are customized using the special upgrades added in this mod

Tool can:

· have a different color (cosmetic only)

· deal more damage

· be more efficient


 ![Displaying Mirror bouncing a laser](https://github.com/KOWI2OO3/Laser-Mod/blob/master/pages/2021-09-04_11.03.40.png?raw=true)
**Mirrors!!**

reflect your laser in any direction to make 1 laser follow a path that was never possible without mirrors

 


 ![Displaying different laser modes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ujdlssKG/images/7af7672ae8a6ec8078815327f7fe6b08f877b8b4.png)

**Different types of lasers!!**

this mod has different looks for your lasers (cosmetic)



 ![A Laser Controlled by an controller](https://github.com/KOWI2OO3/Laser-Mod/blob/master/pages/laser_remote_control.gif?raw=true)

**Remote Controlled Lasers!!**

the lasers in this mod can be remote controlled using a controller and a linker!


![Rainbow laser controlled by a computer](https://github.com/KOWI2OO3/Laser-Mod/blob/master/pages/computer_controlled_laser.gif?raw=true)

**Computer Controlled Lasers!!!**

using the remote controller and a computer form CCTweaked you can control your lasers automatically!!!!
*if you want this example:*
```
     place a computer next to a connected remote controller and type in the computer:
              "pastebin get W8jJ9VNU startup" 
               then reboot the computer
```

 

![Rainbow laser controlled by a computer](https://github.com/KOWI2OO3/Laser-Mod/blob/master/pages/computer_controlled_laser_projector.gif?raw=true)

Computer Controlled Laser Projector!!!
The laser projector can also be remote controlled even with a computer form CCTweaked!!

(broken since the new projector, work is in progress)

*if you want this example:*
```
     place a computer next to a connected remote controller and type in the computer:
              "pastebin get jdB12WJB startup" 
               then reboot the computer
```

 

 

**There is even More!!!**

· *a special and unique crafting system (machines can be upgraded)*

· *tools that can be charged*

· *armor that can be charged*

· *ingame manual*

· *many unique upgrades*

· *a laser projector (can also be upgraded)*

· *JEI Compatability*

· *Compatible with CCTweaked*

 

 
 

**DISCLAIMER!**

 
*Please only download this mod from modrinth or curseforge, these are the only official platforms this mod is released on. Please Don't download this mod from any other site that makes money from this mod! I'm not responsible for anything that happens on other sites trying to download this mod.*

  
 

 

**Also:**

This is my first ever mod and I would like to hear your opinion.

 

Got any suggestions? please let me know.

Please report bugs if you find any, Thanks in Advanced!
